title: lindsaea stricta var. stricta
intro: Lindsaea stricta var. stricta, also known as the Strict Tree Fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Lindsaeaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Caledonia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Lindsaea stricta var. stricta are attributed to its ability to treat various ailments, including fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, and it can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for consumption, though I couldn't find information about specific herbal preparations.
